op.text: Elena: Elena (Marcus's partner); gave birth to daughter Nina on 2025-03-06
Nina: Nina (niece, daughter of Marcus and Elena); born 2025-03-06; Dana described crying at her desk upon seeing the first photo of Nina in a knit hat

[2025-03-09] Marcus called Dana from the hospital hallway at approximately 2am Denver time after Nina's birth just to say 'she's here.' Dana said: 'We haven't talked like that — voice shaking, no agenda — in years. Denver suddenly feels way too far away.'
Plans to visit Marcus, Elena, and new niece Nina in Denver before summer 2025; Marcus offered 'the guest room is yours'; Dana described this as 'a thing I owe now, and I want to owe it'
[as of 2025-03-09] Gathering tax documents for accountant; deadline 2025-03-20; missing one 1099 form
